max_spend.description: The most an agent can spend in a single action (in dollars)
max_spend.hint: Prevents agents from making expensive purchases or transfers without your approval. If an agent tries to spend more than this amount, it will be blocked.

allow_deletion.description: Can the agent permanently delete files, databases, or other data?
allow_deletion.hint: When set to No, the agent cannot remove any files or data. This protects against accidental or malicious data loss.

allow_external_api_calls.description: Can the agent connect to outside services and APIs?
allow_external_api_calls.hint: Controls whether the agent can reach out to third-party services like payment processors, email providers, or other websites.

max_files_modified.description: How many files can the agent change at once?
max_files_modified.hint: Limits the blast radius of any single action. A lower number means the agent must work in smaller, safer batches.

allow_sensitive_data_access.description: Can the agent view passwords, tokens, or personal info?
allow_sensitive_data_access.hint: When set to No, the agent is blocked from reading passwords, API keys, social security numbers, or other private data.

allow_network_requests.description: Can the agent send data out over the internet?
allow_network_requests.hint: Controls whether the agent can make outbound network connections. Turning this off keeps the agent completely offline.

max_batch_operations.description: How many items can the agent process in a single batch?
max_batch_operations.hint: Prevents the agent from running massive bulk operations that could overwhelm systems or cause widespread changes.
